meta.title: Furkan Tunalı CV
meta.description: Experienced AI, software and platform engineer architecting scalable, innovative solutions for multi-cloud environments, optimizing developer experience across web development, full-stack. Currently working with AI to reimagine software functionality and create intelligent solutions.

summary: Experienced AI, software and platform engineer building scalable full-stack systems, cloud infrastructure, and agentic AI pipelines.

projects.name: Newsify Today
projects.subtitle: AI news platform & ChatGPT App (MCP App)
projects.intro: Near zero-cost, self-hosted Agentic AI pipeline curates, reviews, scores, and summarizes trending news in real time across the world.
bullets: LangGraph agent with self-hosted Ollama (Qwen) (3 nodes) + Gemini fallback; MCP server shipped as ChatGPT App.

subroles.title: Senior AI Solutions Engineer
bullets: Built AI workflow with OpenAI & Tavily APIs analyzing customer input to auto-identify GDPR vendors, researching hosting locations, DPO emails, and privacy policy links for compliance automation.
